M2.rationale_snippet: Launch as **“Mastery” — the path to true skill.**

M3.rationale_snippet: The binding constraint for any $1200 novel hardware launch is not Total Addressable Market; it is utilization. Consumer hardware startups die when initial buyers put the device in a closet. Unused products generate zero word-of-mouth, which forces the company to rely on paid acquisition until the $4

M4.rationale_snippet: We choose **Option A: “Mastery” framing**, because it most fully aligns the product’s value with the dignity of its users, while avoiding the unjustified harms that trail the other paths.
